highlights.headline: Orlando Magic vs. Phoenix Suns: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Orlando Magic vs. Phoenix Suns: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Orlando Magic vs. Phoenix Suns: Game Highlights) 2026/02/21 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jalen Green hit a 3-pointer from the right corner at the buzzer to give the Phoenix Suns a 113-110 double-overtime victory over the Orlando Magic on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Green shakes off rough night with 3 at buzzer, Suns edge Magic 113-110 in 2 OT

highlights.headline: Philadelphia 76ers vs. New Orleans Pelicans: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Philadelphia 76ers vs. New Orleans Pelicans: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Philadelphia 76ers vs. New Orleans Pelicans: Game Highlights) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jordan Poole highlighted a 23-point performance with five 3-pointers, and the New Orleans Pelicans outscored Philadelphia 60-35 during the final 21 minutes to beat the 76ers 126-111 on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jordan Poole's 2nd-half surge helps the Pelicans top the 76ers, 126-111

highlights.description: Memphis Grizzlies vs. Miami Heat: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Memphis Grizzlies vs. Miami Heat: Game Highlights) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Andrew Wiggins scored 28 points on 9-of-10 shooting, Norman Powell finished with 25 and the Miami Heat beat the Memphis Grizzlies 136-120 on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wiggins makes 9-of-10 shots in 28-point outing to lead Heat over Grizzlies 136-120

highlights.headline: Detroit Pistons vs. Chicago Bulls: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Detroit Pistons vs. Chicago Bulls: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Detroit Pistons vs. Chicago Bulls: Game Highlights) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jalen Duren had 26 points and 13 rebounds in his return from a suspension to help the Detroit Pistons take charge in the second half and roll to a 126-110 victory over the Chicago Bulls on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Duren with 26 points, 13 rebounds in return, Pistons top Bulls 126-110 for 5th straight win

events.name: Sacramento Kings at San Antonio Spurs

highlights.headline: Sacramento Kings vs. San Antonio Spurs: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Sacramento Kings vs. San Antonio Spurs: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Sacramento Kings vs. San Antonio Spurs: Game Highlights) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Victor Wembanyama had 28 points and 15 rebounds, and the San Antonio Spurs beat the Sacramento Kings 139-122 on Saturday night for their eighth straight win and a sweep of their two games in Austin.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wembanyama has 28 points, 15 rebounds to lead Spurs to eighth straight win, 139-122 over Kings

events.name: Houston Rockets at New York Knicks

highlights.headline: Knicks erase 18-point 4th-quarter deficit to stun Rockets
highlights.description: The Knicks complete their largest fourth-quarter comeback since 2023 with a 108-106 win over the Rockets.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Knicks erase 18-point 4th-quarter deficit to stun Rockets) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Karl-Anthony Towns scored 25 points, Jalen Bruson had 20 and the New York Knicks overcame an 18-point deficit in the fourth quarter to beat the Houston Rockets 108-106 on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Knicks overcome an 18-point deficit in the 4th quarter to beat the Rockets 108-106

video.headline: Knicks erase 18-point 4th-quarter deficit to stun Rockets
